zh.title: 艾达币/美元技术分析：震荡偏强中的修复上行
zh.content:
短线走势维持震荡偏强结构，价格稳守0.15关口上方，整体仍处于均线支撑之上，动能略有修复迹象但上方阻力仍需确认，多空分歧存在

MACD仍处轻微负值区间但柱体收敛，空头动能减弱，短期或进入底部震荡修复阶段SMA20提供支撑信号，RSI暂缺但不影响结构判断

下方关键支撑位位于0.1490附近，若失守可能回测0.1460均线区域，上方短压0.1505需关注突破有效性与量能配合确认

操作上建议以回调低吸为主，若站稳0.1505可轻仓跟随趋势，跌破支撑需及时止损观望短线区间操作为主控制仓位防止波动风险

en.title: Cardano vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
is currently trading in a narrow consolidation range around 0.150, reflecting a mild short-term bullish bias after a 0.74% daily gain. Price action shows tightening volatility between 0.14905 and 0.150484, suggesting equilibrium between buyers and sellers. The structure indicates a potential continuation of a micro uptrend, as higher lows are gradually forming. However, momentum remains limited, requiring a decisive breakout above recent highs to confirm strength.

Momentum indicators present a mixed picture. The MACD at -0.00045 remains in negative territory, signaling lingering bearish pressure despite recent price stabilization. With RSI unavailable, trend strength assessment relies more heavily on price structure. The 20-period SMA at 0.1462 acts as a dynamic support, with price currently trading above it. This positioning suggests short-term recovery momentum, though confirmation requires sustained positive MACD convergence and improving volume participation in the market.

Immediate resistance is located at 0.15048, the recent intraday high, with a breakout above this level opening path toward 0.1510 and potentially 0.1550 if momentum expands. On the downside, initial support sits at 0.14905, followed by stronger structural support near the 20-SMA at 0.1462. A sustained break below this zone would weaken the bullish bias and expose a retest of lower consolidation levels around 0.1450, indicating range-bound risk remains present in short-term structure.

Short-term traders may consider a breakout strategy above 0.15048, targeting 0.1510 with extension toward 0.1550 if volume confirms expansion. Conservative buyers should wait for a retest of support near 0.1490–0.1462 to improve risk-reward positioning. Failure to hold 0.1490 could trigger short setups toward 0.1460. Risk management remains essential, with tight stops below key support zones due to low volatility compression. Overall structure favors cautious bullish bias while range persists short-term.
